name: openemr-asr-demo
description: CSC 436 demo project for OpenEMR voice-to-text integration.

scripts.check: npm run check:js && npm run check:py && npm run check:manifest
scripts.check:js: node --check extension/content.js && node --check extension/scanner.js && node --check scripts/build-extension.mjs && node --check scripts/watch-extension.mjs
